stories.title: Follow live: Schjelderup scores stunning opener to...
Noskova outlasts Muchova in Wimbledon final
stories.summary: Linda Noskova recovered from a second-set meltdown to overcome Karolina Muchova 6-2, 5-7, 6-3 in an all-Czech Wimbledon final on Saturday for her first Grand Slam trophy.

stories.title: White Sox take UCLA SS Cholowsky with top pick
stories.summary: The White Sox selected UCLA shortstop Roch Cholowsky with the No. 1 pick in the 2026 MLB draft Saturday.

stories.title: Morant ready to 'start fresh' with Trail Blazers
stories.summary: Ja Morant said Saturday that his offseason trade from the Grizzlies to the Trail Blazers will give him the chance to "start fresh" and prove that his "bad guy" image is a misconception.

stories.title: Day after cycle, White Sox OF Peters an All-Star
stories.summary: Tristan Peters, who just hit for the cycle for the White Sox, and Dodgers LHP Justin Wrobleski were named to the All-Star rosters Saturday.
